HomePage.title: Edge Folio
HomePage.heroTitle: Your career, told truthfully - and tailored to every role
HomePage.heroSubtitle: EdgeFolio keeps one factual source of truth about your work, then uses AI that ranks and rewrites - never invents - to tailor it to each job. Export ATS-ready resumes, cover letters, and TN visa letters.
HomePage.heroNote: Your data stays yours - tokens live in HTTP-only cookies and proprietary code never leaves your device.
HomePage.pillarsSubtitle: The LLM ranks and rewrites. It never invents.

matrix.title: Immutable Matrix
matrix.body: Curate pre-approved, factual STAR bullet points and skills - the master record every resume draws from.

tailor.title: Honest AI tailoring
tailor.body: Rank and rewrite your real achievements against any job description, with overall, technical, and TN-likelihood match scores.

jobs.title: Live job discovery
jobs.body: Browse a USMCA-focused catalog or bring your own API keys for a private feed, then save a posting straight into an application.

export.title: ATS & TN-ready export
export.body: Generate cover letters and NAFTA/USMCA TN visa letters, and export polished PDFs that pass applicant tracking systems.

HomePage.featuresTitle: Everything you need to apply with confidence

matrix.title: Immutable Matrix
matrix.body: Factual, pre-approved bullet points and skills in STAR format - the database the LLM draws from.

tailor.title: Application tailoring
tailor.body: Rewrite bullets, skills, work experience, and projects per role, with match scores and explanations.

company.title: Company intelligence
company.body: Automatic research on the company you're targeting - about, analysis, and an intel score.

letters.title: Cover & TN letters
letters.body: Cover letters and NAFTA/USMCA TN visa support letters, generated from your tailored content.

jobs.title: Jobs catalog
jobs.body: Live postings across the US, Canada, and Mexico, with an optional private feed from your own keys.

passkeys.title: Passkey security
passkeys.body: Sign in with WebAuthn passkeys; JWTs stay in HTTP-only cookies, invisible to JavaScript.

HomePage.privacyBody: Proprietary codebases are analyzed locally in your browser. Only sanitized stack metadata - languages, frameworks, and dependencies - is ever sent to the server. Your source code never leaves your machine.
HomePage.privacyTech: Powered by in-browser structural parsing (tree-sitter WASM) - no model download, no GPU required.
HomePage.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your job search?
HomePage.ctaSubtitle: Build your Immutable Matrix today and tailor your way to the next role.
